core_mechanism: constrained energy minimization over a codimension-one (Nehari-type) constraint manifold to extract least-energy and sign-changing critical points of a variational functional, preceded by a change of variables that recasts a non-quadratic (quasilinear) energy into a tractable semilinear one
brief_reason: The abstract states the analysis relies on a change of variables reducing the quasilinear structure to a semilinear variational framework together with critical point theory on Nehari-type manifolds to obtain nontrivial positive and least-energy nodal solutions.
